name: Sensera Limited
summary: Sensera Limited operates as an Internet of Things (IOT) solution provider that delivers sensor-based products transforming real-time data into meaningful information, action, and value in the United States and Germany. The company operates in two segments, Microdevices and IoT Solutions. The Microdevices segment designs and manufactures micro sensors and micro-fabricated components. The IoT Solutions segment represents the embedded location platform, which delivers location awareness for safety and productivity solutions across industrial and consumer markets covering real-time positioning and concurrent wireless communication. Sensera Limited was incorporated in 2016 and is based in Melbourne, Australia.
